features: Yardley Gentleman Legacy Eau De Toilette Spray 3.4 Oz for Men by Yardley Of London
Yardley gentleman suave is a modern, sophisticated fragrance for him
The fragrance opens with crisp notes of pink pepper and mandarin revealing a rich heart of cedarwood and cocoa
description: Product Description Yardley gentleman suave is a modern, sophisticated fragrance for him. The fragrance opens with crisp notes of pink pepper and mandarin revealing a rich heart of cedarwood and cocoa, settling down to a base of patchouli and oak moss. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Parfum (Fragrance), Aqua (Water), Linalool, Limonene, Coumarin, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Hydroxycitronellal, Citronellol, Benzyl Salicylate, Tert-Butyl Alcohol, Citral, Methyl 2-Octynoate, Geraniol, Amyl Cinnamal, Hexyl Cinnamal, Eugenol, Isoeugenol. Directions Spray a moderate amount of fragrance on pulse points such as the wrist, inner elbow, and neck for a lasting scent. Safety Warning Flammable. For external use only. See more
